_note: Sample data for CPT slug `products` + ACF. product_images 需上传后自行在后台选图。

products.title: 120D/2 Polyester Embroidery Thread — Semi-Dull
products.content: High-tenacity 120D/2 polyester embroidery thread for apparel, home textiles, and promotional embroidery. Stable dyeing, low thread breakage, suitable for high-speed machines.

acf.product_introduction: OEM-ready 120D/2 two-ply polyester embroidery thread with semi-dull luster. Ideal for logos, monograms, and fashion embroidery on scarves and uniforms.
acf.faq_list:
Do you support custom colors?|Yes, lab-dip and bulk dyeing to your Pantone or physical sample.
What is the lead time for bulk orders?|Typically 15–25 days after color approval, depending on quantity.
Can we get samples before ordering?|Yes, sample cones or color cards can be arranged against freight or sample charge.

products.title: 75D/2 Bright Trilobal Embroidery Thread
products.content: Trilobal cross-section for extra sheen and light reflection. Popular for decorative embroidery where a brighter, more lustrous look is required.

acf.product_introduction: 75D/2 bright trilobal polyester embroidery thread delivering a vivid, high-sheen finish for badges, caps, and premium garment decoration.
acf.faq_list:
Is this thread suitable for metallic-effect designs?|It is polyester with high luster, not metallic; pair with metallic threads where needed.
Do you provide Oeko-Tex certificates?|Certificates can be provided for qualifying bulk orders; ask sales for the latest scope.

products.title: 150D/2 Full-Dull Embroidery Thread for Uniforms
products.content: Full-dull finish reduces glare under workplace lighting. Widely used for corporate uniforms, workwear, and institutional textiles.

acf.product_introduction: 150D/2 full-dull polyester embroidery thread engineered for uniform programs requiring a soft, matte appearance and reliable color fastness.
acf.faq_list:
What fastness grades do you target?|We target good wash and rub fastness; specific grades can be confirmed per color and substrate.
Can you match our existing thread?|Send a physical sample or data sheet; we will match as closely as bulk dyeing allows.

products.title: 108D/2 Recycled Polyester Embroidery Thread (GRS option)
products.content: Embroidery thread based on recycled polyester content where supply chain documentation is available. Suitable for brands with sustainability requirements.

acf.product_introduction: 108D/2 recycled-content polyester embroidery thread (GRS-aligned options on request) for eco-positioned apparel and accessories.
acf.faq_list:
What recycled content can you offer?|Typical offers are quoted per batch; certification scope varies—confirm with our team before order.
Is pricing higher than virgin polyester?|Usually yes, due to chip cost and traceability; we quote case by case.
